test_traj.command:
cat > test_alive.ll << 'EOF'
; Test for alive-tv verification
target datalayout = "e-m:e-p270:32:32-p271:32:32-p272:64:64-i64:64-f80:128-n8:16:32:64-S128"

define i32 @test(i32 %n) {
entry:
  %cmp = icmp sgt i32 %n, 0
  br i1 %cmp, label %for.body.preheader, label %for.end

for.body.preheader:
  br label %for.body

for.body:
  %i = phi i32 [ 0, %for.body.preheader ], [ %i.next, %for.body ]
  %sum = phi i32 [ 0, %for.body.preheader ], [ %sum.next, %for.body ]
  
  ; Use that should trigger IV widening
  %i.ext = sext i32 %i to i64
  %arrayidx = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr null, i64 %i.ext
  %load = load i32, ptr %arrayidx, align 4
  %sum.next = add i32 %sum, %load
  
  %i.next = add nsw i32 %i, 1
  %cmp.exit = icmp slt i32 %i.next, %n
  br i1 %cmp.exit, label %for.body, label %for.end.loopexit

for.end.loopexit:
  %sum.lcssa = phi i32 [ %sum.next, %for.body ]
  br label %for.end

for.end:
  %result = phi i32 [ 0, %entry ], [ %sum.lcssa, %for.end.loopexit ]
  ret i32 %result
}
EOF
opt -S -passes="indvars" test_correctness.ll -o test_correctness_opt.ll && alive-tv test_correctness.ll test_correctness_opt.ll 2>&1 | head -50

define i32 @test_correctness(i32 %n) {
entry:
  %cmp = icmp sgt i32 %n, 0
  br i1 %cmp, label %for.body.preheader, label %for.end

for.body.preheader:
  %wide.trip.count = zext i32 %n to i64
  br label %for.body

for.body:
  %indvars.iv = phi i64 [ %indvars.iv.next, %for.body ], [ 0, %for.body.preheader ]
  %sum = phi i32 [ 0, %for.body.preheader ], [ %sum.next, %for.body ]
  %arrayidx = gep inbounds ptr null, 4 x i64 %indvars.iv
  %load = load i32, ptr %arrayidx, align 4
  %sum.next = add i32 %sum, %load
  %indvars.iv.next = add nsw nuw i64 %indvars.iv, 1
  %exitcond = icmp ne i64 %indvars.iv.next, %wide.trip.count
  br i1 %exitcond, label %for.body, label %for.end.loopexit

for.end.loopexit:
